questionHtml:
Light of intensity 500 W m−2 is incident on concrete and on snow. 300 W m−2 is reflected from the
concrete and 400 W m−2 is reflected from the snow.

What is albedo of concretealbedo of snow?


A.  12

B.  34

C.  43

D.  2

meta.title: Light of intensity 500 W m−2 is incident on concrete and on snow. 300 W m−2 is reflected from theconcrete and 400 W m−2 is reflected from the snow. What is albedo of concretealbedo
breadcrumbLabels: B. The particulate nature of matter
